customer_message: I was charged twice for my monthly subscription. My account shows $200 instead of $100.
response_quality_hint: Apologize, acknowledge the issue, promise immediate escalation

customer_message: The app keeps crashing whenever I try to open the dashboard. It just closes immediately.
response_quality_hint: Acknowledge the crash, ask for details (OS, version), escalate to engineering

customer_message: There's a typo in the FAQ section. It says 'recieve' instead of 'receive'.
response_quality_hint: Thank them for reporting, mention it will be fixed

customer_message: My password reset email never arrived. I requested it 30 minutes ago and still nothing.
response_quality_hint: Offer to resend, ask to check spam, suggest password reset link directly

customer_message: I can't log in. It says 'Invalid credentials' but I'm sure my password is correct.
response_quality_hint: Suggest password reset, offer account recovery options

customer_message: The login button on the homepage is broken. It doesn't respond when I click it.
response_quality_hint: Critical issue blocking access, escalate immediately to engineering

customer_message: I need a refund. I paid $50 but didn't receive the product.
response_quality_hint: Acknowledge, offer refund or replacement, escalate to billing team

customer_message: The website is completely down. I get a white page when I try to access it.
response_quality_hint: Critical outage, immediate escalation to engineering/devops

customer_message: How do I change my profile picture? I can't find the option.
response_quality_hint: Provide step-by-step instructions, reference help docs

customer_message: I want to delete my account and all my data.
response_quality_hint: Ask for confirmation, explain data deletion process, may need compliance team

customer_message: Your competitor's product is cheaper. Why should I stay?
response_quality_hint: Acknowledge concern, highlight value, may need to involve sales/retention

customer_message: I received a suspicious email from support@yourapp.com asking for my password. Is this legitimate?
response_quality_hint: Warn them we never ask for passwords, escalate to security team

customer_message: The mobile app won't sync my data with the web version.
response_quality_hint: Escalate to engineering, ask for device info

customer_message: I was overcharged by $25 last month. Can you refund the difference?
response_quality_hint: Apologize for overcharge, confirm details, escalate to billing

customer_message: Your documentation is confusing and outdated. Please update it.
response_quality_hint: Thank them, acknowledge, route to docs team or support
